silhouette_language: Rounded timber, rough-hewn stone blocks, hand-forged ironwork; wear reads as age and hand-tooling, not machining. Organic irregularity is welcome; avoid straight machined panel lines or right-angle greebles.
vision_style_brief: Assets should read as hand-built fantasy-medieval construction: warm browns and stone greys, gold or oxblood accents used sparingly for banners/trim, visible tool marks and grain, torch-lit emissive glow rather than sci-fi strip lighting. NOT: polished metal panels, teal/orange sci-fi accents, symmetrical machined detail.
